title: 24 Pcs Bow Cupcake Toppers, Pink Ribbon Bow Cake Topper Reusable Cupcake Picks Birthday Decorations for Wedding Baby Shower Bachelorette Halloween Christmas Party Supplies
features: 【Elegant Design】Our bow cupcake toppers feature a charming bowknot design that adds a touch of elegance to any celebration. The vibrant pink color and exquisite detailing make cupcake toppers perfect for coquette-themed parties, weddings, and baby showers

【High-Quality Materials】Crafted from premium polyester satin ribbon, these pink cupcake toppers are designed to withstand the test of time and safe to use with cupcakes, cookies, cakes, etc, providing a reliable and reusable decoration for multiple events

【Versatile Use】These bow decorations for party are not just for cupcakes. Their versatile design allows them to be used on cakes, fruit platters, and other desserts. Ideal for birthdays, bridal showers, and bachelorette parties, they add a whimsical touch to any occasion

【Easy to Use】With a compact and lightweight design, these cake & cupcake toppers are easy to insert into any dessert. The toothpick ensures stability, allowing you to effortlessly enhance your treats without the need for additional tools or effort

【Sufficient Quantity】Each package includes 24 baby shower cupcake toppers, providing ample decorations for your event. Pink bows for cake can create a cohesive and stylish theme for your desserts, making your celebration truly memorable
